description_long: This advertising board consists of a large, white, rectangular box elevated on a sturdy metal frame. The box features bold black text reading 'YOUR AD HERE!' on its visible face, suggesting it is designed for customizable advertisements. The top of the box is open or covered with a lattice-like metal structure, providing structural support and possibly preventing debris accumulation. The supporting frame is metallic, with a weathered, industrial appearance, and consists of four vertical legs connected by horizontal braces for stability. The overall design is utilitarian, prioritizing visibility and durability for outdoor urban environments. The board is likely intended for placement in high-traffic areas to maximize advertisement exposure.
description: A large, white, rectangular advertising board with bold black text, mounted on a weathered metal frame for urban outdoor use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full 'YOUR AD HERE!' text and the metal frame supporting the white box.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view, still showing the advertisement text and the lattice structure at the top.
description_view_2: Another angled view with the text visible, highlighting the depth of the box and the frame's construction.
description_view_3: Side view with the text partially visible, emphasizing the box's rectangular shape and the frame's symmetry.
attribute_frame_design: thick, industrial metal frame with vertical and horizontal supports
attribute_advertisement_content: static printed text reading 'YOUR AD HERE!' in bold black letters
